gamebooks.title: The Long Shadow
gamebooks.author: Steven Blanc
gamebooks.description: A complete 1990s noir test adventure featuring former police detective Nathan Reed.

gamebooks.title: Anya and the Suitcase That Took the Scenic Route
gamebooks.author: Steven Blanc
gamebooks.description: Anya's carefully packed suitcase begins a holiday of its own, sending her and Steven through luggage depots, accidental tours, a celebrity mix-up, and a hidden island festival where the best souvenirs are the stories collected along the way.

gamebooks.title: The Sunken Vault
gamebooks.author: StoryBoy
gamebooks.description: A short solo delve that teaches StoryBoy's adventure systems: character stats, a luck check, and a real fight where your health matters.
